upgrades.changelog:
- SDK with fixed dead node issue
- Added detached mode
- Added inclusion option with disabled input parameter
- Added manual configuration for up/down parameters (functional via physical inputs; not yet via Z-Wave commands)
- Added parameter state reporting to controller
- Added Meter CC support to endpoints
- Fixed associations to resolve Home Assistant issues
- Fixed LED signaling
- Fixed circuit protection
- Fixed Meter OP parameter (disables end switches when set to 10)
- Fixed Meter CC (no watt reporting when parameter 36 is set to 0)
- Fixed venetian mode
- Fixed parameter 39
- Fixed calibration issue
- Fixed abnormal output when parameter 85 is set to 0
- Fixed multilevel report & multilevel switch start/stop behavior
- other minor improvements
